verses.1: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD.
verses.2: Blessed are those who keep His testimonies and seek Him with all their heart.
verses.3: They do no iniquity; they walk in His ways.
verses.4: You have commanded us to keep Your precepts diligently.
verses.5: Oh, that my ways were directed to keep Your statutes!
verses.6: Then I would not be ashamed when I consider all Your commandments.
verses.7: I will praise You with an upright heart when I learn Your righteous judgments.
verses.8: I will keep Your statutes; do not utterly forsake me.

verses.9: How shall a young man keep his way pure? By guarding it according to Your word.
verses.10: With all my heart I have sought You; do not let me stray from Your commandments.
verses.11: I have hidden Your word in my heart that I might not sin against You.
verses.12: Blessed are You, O LORD; teach me Your statutes.
verses.13: With my lips I have declared all the judgments of Your mouth.
verses.14: I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies as much as in all riches.
verses.15: I will meditate on Your precepts and regard Your ways.
verses.16: I will delight in Your statutes; I will not forget Your word.

verses.17: Deal bountifully with Your servant, that I may live and keep Your word.
verses.18: Open my eyes that I may behold wondrous things from Your law.
verses.19: I am a stranger on the earth; do not hide Your commandments from me.
verses.20: My soul is consumed with longing for Your judgments at all times.
verses.21: You rebuke the arrogant — the cursed who stray from Your commandments.
verses.22: Remove from me reproach and contempt, for I have kept Your testimonies.
verses.23: Though rulers sit and speak against me, Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
verses.24: Your testimonies are my delight; they are my counselors.

verses.25: My soul cleaves to the dust; revive me according to Your word.
verses.26: I declared my ways, and You answered me; teach me Your statutes.
verses.27: Make me understand the way of Your precepts; then I will meditate on Your wondrous works.
verses.28: My soul melts with sorrow; strengthen me according to Your word.
verses.29: Remove from me the way of deceit, and grant me Your law graciously.
verses.30: I have chosen the way of truth; I have set Your judgments before me.
verses.31: I cling to Your testimonies, O LORD; do not put me to shame.
verses.32: I run in the path of Your commandments, for You enlarge my heart.

verses.33: Teach me, O LORD, the way of Your statutes, and I will keep it to the end.
verses.34: Give me understanding that I may keep Your law and observe it with all my heart.
verses.35: Direct me in the path of Your commandments, for there I find delight.
verses.36: Incline my heart to Your testimonies and not to covetousness.
verses.37: Turn my eyes away from worthless things; revive me in Your way.
verses.38: Establish Your word to Your servant, who is devoted to Your fear.
verses.39: Turn away the reproach I dread, for Your judgments are good.
verses.40: Behold, I long for Your precepts; revive me in Your righteousness.

verses.41: Let Your mercies come to me, O LORD — Your salvation, according to Your word.
verses.42: So shall I have an answer for him who taunts me, for I trust in Your word.
verses.43: Do not take the word of truth utterly from my mouth, for I hope in Your judgments.
verses.44: I will keep Your law continually, forever and ever.
verses.45: And I will walk in freedom, for I seek Your precepts.
verses.46: I will speak of Your testimonies before kings, and I will not be ashamed.
verses.47: I delight in Your commandments, for I love them.
verses.48: I lift up my hands to Your commandments, which I love, and I meditate on Your statutes.

verses.49: Remember Your word to Your servant, upon which You have caused me to hope.
verses.50: This is my comfort in affliction, that Your word has revived me.
verses.51: The arrogant utterly deride me, but I do not turn from Your law.
verses.52: I remember Your judgments of old, O LORD, and in them I find comfort.
verses.53: Horror has taken hold of me because of the wicked who forsake Your law.
verses.54: Your statutes are songs to me in the house of my pilgrimage.
verses.55: In the night, O LORD, I remember Your name, that I may keep Your law.
verses.56: This I had, because I kept Your precepts.

verses.57: The LORD is my portion; I have said that I would keep Your words.
verses.58: I have sought Your favor with all my heart; be gracious to me according to Your word.
verses.59: I considered my ways and turned my steps to Your testimonies.
verses.60: I made haste and did not delay to keep Your commandments.
verses.61: Though the bands of the wicked bind me, I do not forget Your law.
verses.62: At midnight I rise to give You thanks for Your righteous judgments.
verses.63: I am a companion of all who fear You, and of those who keep Your precepts.
verses.64: The earth is full of Your mercy, O LORD; teach me Your statutes.

verses.65: You have dealt well with Your servant, O LORD, according to Your word.
verses.66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in Your commandments.
verses.67: Before I was afflicted I went astray, but now I keep Your word.
verses.68: You are good, and You do good; teach me Your statutes.
verses.69: Though the arrogant have smeared me with lies, I keep Your precepts with all my heart.
verses.70: Their hearts are callous and insensitive, but I delight in Your law.
verses.71: It was good for me to be afflicted, that I might learn Your statutes.
verses.72: The law of Your mouth is more precious to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver.

verses.73: Your hands have made me and fashioned me; give me understanding to learn Your commandments.
verses.74: May those who fear You see me and rejoice, for I have hoped in Your word.
verses.75: I know, O LORD, that Your judgments are right, and that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.
verses.76: Let Your mercy comfort me, I pray, according to Your word to Your servant.
verses.77: Let Your mercy come to me, that I may live, for Your law is my delight.
verses.78: Let the arrogant be put to shame, for they have wronged me without cause; I will meditate on Your precepts.
verses.79: Let those who fear You turn to me, those who know Your testimonies.
verses.80: Let my heart be blameless in Your statutes, that I may not be put to shame.

verses.81: My soul faints for Your salvation; I wait for Your word.
verses.82: My eyes fail, looking for Your word; I ask, "When will You comfort me?"
verses.83: Though I am like a wineskin dried up by smoke, I do not forget Your statutes.
verses.84: How many are the days of Your servant? When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
verses.85: The arrogant have dug pits for me in violation of Your law.
verses.86: All Your commandments are faithful; I am persecuted without cause — help me!
verses.87: They almost consumed me from the earth, but I have not forsaken Your precepts.
verses.88: Revive me according to Your mercy, that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.

verses.89: Your word, O LORD, is everlasting; it is settled in the heavens.
verses.90: Your faithfulness continues through all generations; You established the earth, and it endures.
verses.91: Your ordinances stand to this day, for all things are Your servants.
verses.92: If Your law had not been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.
verses.93: I will never forget Your precepts, for by them You have revived me.
verses.94: I am Yours; save me, for I have sought Your precepts.
verses.95: The wicked wait to destroy me, but I will consider Your testimonies.
verses.96: I have seen an end to all perfection, but Your commandment is without limit.

verses.97: Oh, how I love Your law! All day long it is my meditation.
verses.98: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for they are always with me.
verses.99: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for Your testimonies are my meditation.
verses.100: I understand more than the elders, for I keep Your precepts.
verses.101: I have kept my feet from every evil path, that I may keep Your word.
verses.102: I have not departed from Your judgments, for You Yourself have taught me.
verses.103: How sweet are Your words to my taste — sweeter than honey to my mouth!
verses.104: Through Your precepts I gain understanding; therefore I hate every false way.

verses.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
verses.106: I have sworn and confirmed that I will keep Your righteous judgments.
verses.107: I am severely afflicted, O LORD; revive me according to Your word.
verses.108: Accept the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD, and teach me Your judgments.
verses.109: My soul is continually in my hand, yet I do not forget Your law.
verses.110: The wicked have set a snare for me, but I have not strayed from Your precepts.
verses.111: Your testimonies are my heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.
verses.112: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes, even to the very end.

verses.113: I hate vain thoughts, but Your law I love.
verses.114: You are my hiding place and my shield; I hope in Your word.
verses.115: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.
verses.116: Uphold me according to Your word, that I may live; let me not be ashamed of my hope.
verses.117: Hold me up, and I will be saved, that I may always regard Your statutes.
verses.118: You reject all who stray from Your statutes, for their deceit is falsehood.
verses.119: All the wicked on earth You discard like dross; therefore I love Your testimonies.
verses.120: My flesh trembles in fear of You; I stand in awe of Your judgments.

verses.121: I have done what is just and right; do not leave me to my oppressors.
verses.122: Be surety for Your servant for good; do not let the arrogant oppress me.
verses.123: My eyes fail, looking for Your salvation and for Your righteous word.
verses.124: Deal with Your servant according to Your mercy, and teach me Your statutes.
verses.125: I am Your servant; give me understanding, that I may know Your testimonies.
verses.126: It is time for the LORD to act, for they have broken Your law.
verses.127: Therefore I love Your commandments more than gold, even the purest gold.
verses.128: Therefore I esteem all Your precepts to be right, and I hate every false way.

verses.129: Wonderful are Your testimonies; therefore my soul keeps them.
verses.130: The unfolding of Your words gives light; it gives understanding to the simple.
verses.131: I open my mouth and pant, longing for Your commandments.
verses.132: Turn to me and be merciful to me, as You are accustomed to do to those who love Your name.
verses.133: Order my steps in Your word; let no iniquity have dominion over me.
verses.134: Deliver me from the oppression of man, that I may keep Your precepts.
verses.135: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, and teach me Your statutes.
verses.136: My eyes shed streams of tears because they do not keep Your law.

verses.137: Righteous are You, O LORD, and upright are Your judgments.
verses.138: The testimonies You have commanded are righteous and altogether faithful.
verses.139: My zeal has consumed me because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
verses.140: Your word is completely pure; therefore Your servant loves it.
verses.141: I am lowly and despised, but I do not forget Your precepts.
verses.142: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and Your law is truth.
verses.143: Trouble and distress have found me, but Your commandments are my delight.
verses.144: Your testimonies are righteous forever; give me understanding, that I may live.

verses.145: I call with all my heart; answer me, O LORD! I will keep Your statutes.
verses.146: I call to You; save me, that I may keep Your testimonies.
verses.147: I rise before dawn and cry for help; I hope in Your word.
verses.148: My eyes anticipate the watches of the night, that I may meditate on Your word.
verses.149: Hear my voice, O LORD, according to Your mercy; revive me according to Your judgments.
verses.150: Those who follow after wickedness draw near; they are far from Your law.
verses.151: You are near, O LORD, and all Your commandments are truth.
verses.152: Long ago I learned from Your testimonies that You have established them forever.

verses.153: Consider my affliction and deliver me, for I have not forgotten Your law.
verses.154: Plead my cause and redeem me; revive me according to Your word.
verses.155: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they do not seek Your statutes.
verses.156: Great are Your mercies, O LORD; revive me according to Your judgments.
verses.157: Though my persecutors and foes are many, I have not turned from Your testimonies.
verses.158: I look on the faithless with grief, because they do not keep Your word.
verses.159: Consider how I love Your precepts, O LORD; revive me according to Your mercy.
verses.160: The entirety of Your word is truth, and all Your righteous judgments endure forever.

verses.161: Rulers persecute me without cause, but my heart stands in awe of Your word.
verses.162: I rejoice in Your word like one who finds great spoil.
verses.163: I hate and abhor falsehood, but Your law I love.
verses.164: Seven times a day I praise You for Your righteous judgments.
verses.165: Great peace have those who love Your law; nothing can make them stumble.
verses.166: I wait for Your salvation, O LORD, and I carry out Your commandments.
verses.167: My soul keeps Your testimonies, and I love them greatly.
verses.168: I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies, for all my ways are before You.

verses.169: Let my cry come before You, O LORD; give me understanding according to Your word.
verses.170: Let my supplication come before You; deliver me according to Your word.
verses.171: My lips pour forth praise, for You teach me Your statutes.
verses.172: My tongue speaks of Your word, for all Your commandments are righteous.
verses.173: Let Your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen Your precepts.
verses.174: I long for Your salvation, O LORD, and Your law is my delight.
verses.175: Let me live to praise You; let Your judgments sustain me.
verses.176: I have strayed like a lost sheep; seek Your servant, for I have not forgotten Your commandments.

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
